meta.site_title_default: Ethlathini Rest Camp — Amakamu e-Overland Ehlathini, Hluhluwe KZN
meta.site_description: Ethlathini Rest Camp — amakamu e-overland ehlathini lemithombo ne-figs, ohlangothini lwe-2km kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Izwe le-Big 5. KwaZulu-Natal, iNingizimu Afrika.

footer.gateDistance: Amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Memorial Gate · Iphaki elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika

home.meta_description: Ethlathini Rest Camp — amakamu e-overland ehlathini lemithombo ne-figs, ohlangothini lwe-2km kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Izwe le-Big 5. KwaZulu-Natal, iNingizimu Afrika.
home.hero_sub_line1: Kusuka emgwaqweni oshaywe ithiyela kuya ehlathini, ngokujika okukodwa nje.
home.hero_sub_line2: Amakamu e-overland azimele ngokuphelele ehlathini lemithombo ne-figs,
home.hero_badge: 🌍 Iphaki elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika · Yasungulwa ngo-1895 · Elesibili elidala emhlabeni
home.split_p1: I-Ethlathini itholakala eqaqeni ngasemgwaqweni omkhulu oya e-Memorial Gate — okumangalisayo ohlangothini lomgwaqo ongeke ulindele. Ngena, futhi ngemuzuzu embalwa ngemuva kokushiya umgwaqo oshaywe ithiyela usuvele ungaphansi kwesivunulo semithombo, i-fig yasendle, ne-tree aloe.
home.split_p2: Izindawo ze-overland ezilula futhi ezinesithunzi zezimoto ezizimele ngokuphelele. Izindawo zomlilo kuzo zonke izindawo ezinezinkuni zamahhala, izindawo zamanzi ahlanzekile, ne-WiFi ezindaweni ezithile. Izindlu zangasese zisezakhiweni — okwamanje kuphela abahambi abazimele ngokuphelele.

features.title: Ihlathi lemithombo ne-figs
features.desc: Lala ngaphansi kwesivunulo sehlathi langempela — isithunzi, ukucula kwezinyoni, nokuthula okuphelele eqaqeni le-KZN.

features.title: I-Big 5 emnyango wakho
features.desc: Amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate. Ibhubesi, ingwe, indlovu, ubhejane, nenyathi ephakini elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika.

features.title: Izindawo ezilungele i-overland
features.desc: Izindawo zemvelo ezinesithunzi zamathenti aphezu kwezimoto, iitreyila, nezimoto ezinkulu ezizimele ngokuphelele.

features.title: Ipharadesi lokubukela izinyoni
features.desc: Izinyoni eziyisimanga zezinhlobo eziningi zitholakala khona lapha epropathini.

features.title: Ukuhamba okuphephile kwasekuseni
features.desc: Indlela ethulile enobude obungangamamitha angu-400 ngasemngceleni wepropathi — ukuhamba okunesithunzi ehlathini.

features.title: Ikhofi Shop kanye Nenaseri
features.desc: Izovulwa maduze — ikhofi emnandi ehlathini, kanye nezitshalo zendabuko ongazithatha uzise ekhaya.

features.title: Umphakathi uyinhliziyo yakho konke
features.desc: Isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono, ingadi yomphakathi, ipulazi lezinhlanzi, kanye nendawo yokudlela — sikwakha isendlalelo ngesendlalelo.

features.title: Sithembekile Futhi Sikhula
features.desc: Sikutshela ukuthi yini esesilungile nokuthi yini engakalungi. Woza sinjengoba sinjalo — sekukufanele nje ukuza.

stats.label: Iphaki lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke emhlabeni

home.roadmap_p1_post: Yilapho ngempela uzosithola khona. Sakha indawo yezenhlalakahle ne-ezomnotho egxile kuleli zwe kanye nasemphakathini wase-Hluhluwe — isendlalelo ngesendlalelo ngokwethembeka.
home.roadmap_p2: Sikutshela ukuthi yini esesivulekile nokuthi yini engakavulwa. Ihlathi liyiqiniso, ukwamukelwa kufudumele, futhi konke okunye kuseza.
home.cta_p: Bhukha ngokuqondile — akukho zindleko ze-platform, ukuqinisekiswa okusheshayo nge-WhatsApp.

about.meta_title: Mayelana Nathi — Ikamu Lasehlathini e-Hluhluwe, KZN
about.meta_description: I-Ethlathini Rest Camp likamu elisehlathini lemithombo ne-figs, amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Indaba yethu, umphakathi wethu, uhambo lwethu lwangempela.
about.p_intro: I-Ethlathini Rest Camp igxumeleze esivunulweni esiluhlaza semithombo, ama-fig asendle, ne-tree aloe eqaqeni ngasemgwaqweni omkhulu oya e-Memorial Gate, futhi liyindawo ekhulayo egxile kwezemvelo, egxile e-KwaZulu-Natal nasenhliziyweni yomphakathi wase-Hluhluwe.
about.p_place: Ipropathi itholakala eqaqeni lapho isivunulo sehlathi sivela khona. Ama-tree aloe ame phezulu ngaphezu kwemithi ye-fig, futhi imithombo inikeza isithunzi esijulile, esibandayo emakamini angezansi. Ngesikhathi sifika, umhlaba wawugcwele izihlahla ezingafuneki ngokuphelele — i-chromolaena ne-lantana zase zithathe konke. Silwa nazo lezi zihlahla kuze kube namuhla, ngesigamu ngesigamu.
about.p_now1: Namuhla sinezindawo ezine ezisusiwe izihlahla zabakampa be-overland — izindawo zemvelo ezisulwe kwabahambi abazimele ngokuphelele abanamathenti aphezu kwezimoto, iitreyila, kanye nezimoto ze-overland. Yonke indawo inendawo yomlilo enezinkuni zamahhala, izindawo zamanzi ahlanzekile, ne-WiFi ezindaweni ezikhethiwe.
about.p_now2: Izindlu zangasese zisathuthukiswa — okwamanje kufanelekela kuphela abahambi be-overland abazimele ngokuphelele.
about.p_book_link: Usulungele ukuzibonela ngawakho amehlo? <link>Bhukha indawo ye-overland</link> uze uzopaka ngaphansi kwesivunulo.
about.p_location: Amakhilomitha ama-2 nje kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi — iphaki lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika (lasungulwa ngo-1895). Izwe le-Big 5, indawo yokugcina enkulu yobhejane omhlophe waseningizimu, kanye nenye yezindawo ezinezinhlobo eziningi kunazo zonke zezinto eziphilayo kulo lonke izwekazi.

facts.label: Kuyeza:
facts.value: Amachalethi, ikhofi shop, inaseri, indawo yokudlela, isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono, ipulazi lezinhlanzi, ingadi yomphakathi

about.signoff: Siyakwamukela. Sijabule ngokuba khona kwakho lapha.

vision.meta_title: Umbono Wethu — Isikhungo Sokufundisa Amakhono & Ibhizinisi Lezenhlalakahle, Hluhluwe
vision.meta_description: I-Ethlathini yakha ikilasi eliphilayo ehlathini — ukwamukela izivakashi, ezolimo, namakhono ekusasa emphakathini wase-Hluhluwe. Buka umbono wethu.
vision.hero_sub: Isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono ehlathini — ukwamukela izivakashi, ezolimo, ubuchwepheshe.
vision.plan_desc: Lona umbono wethu — ikilasi eliphilayo elifake esivunulweni sehlathi. Uhlelo lomoya lukhombisa ukuthi i-Ethlathini izokhula kanjani ibe indawo ephelele yezenhlalakahle ene-amakamu, amachalethi, isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono, ipulazi lezinhlanzi, ikhofi shop, inaseri, kanye nengadi yomphakathi.
vision.plan_note: 📍 Umbono osuka phezulu — buka ihlathi kanye nephupho likhula ndawonye.
vision.pillars_sub: I-Ethlathini yakhiwa njengekilasi eliphilayo — indawo lapho intsha yendawo kanye namalungu omphakathi bezuza amakhono ayiqiniso, athengiseka emakethe.
vision.pillars_book_link: Ufuna ukubona ukuthi kunjani endaweni? <link>Bhukha indawo yekamu</link> ubone insika yokuqala — ukwamukela izivakashi — isebenza.

pillars.title: Amakhono Okwamukela Izivakashi
pillars.desc: Amakamu, ikhofi shop, indawo yokudlela, kanye namachalethi azayo azofundisa abantu ubudlelwano nezivakashi, ukuhlanza, ukuphathwa kwendawo, kanye nokusetha ukudla nokuphuza.

pillars.title: Amakhono Ezandla Nezolimo
pillars.desc: Ingadi yomphakathi, ipulazi lezinhlanzi, inaseri, kanye nendawo yomsebenzi kuzofundisa abantu ukukhiqiza ukudla okusimeme, ukufuya izinhlanzi, ukukhulisa izitshalo zendabuko, kanye nobuchweba, amapayipi, kanye nokubaka.

pillars.title: Amakhono Ekusasa
pillars.desc: Isikhungo semihlangano sizofundisa abantu i-IT, izisekelo ze-AI, ukuphathwa kwemicimbi, kanye nokwazi ubuchwepheshe be-digital. Kuzobamba futhi imishado, imicimbi, kanye nemihlangano yamabhizinisi.

coming_soon.label: Ikhofi Shop Kanye Nenaseri Yezitshalo Zendabuko

vision.cta_p: Bhukha indawo, ube ivolontiya, noma nje woza uzobona esikwakhayo.

dream.meta_description: Ithuba lesibili, umphakathi owakholwa, injongo etholakele kabusha. Indaba yeqiniso ngemuva kwe-Ethlathini Rest Camp e-Hluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal.
dream.hero_sub: Ithuba lesibili. Umphakathi owakholwa. Injongo etholakele kabusha.
dream.p1: Safika e-Hluhluwe siphethe iphupho. Kodwa endleleni, sathemba abantu abangalungile. Kancane kancane, base besisusa umqondo nethemba lethu. Saduka kude nendlela okwakufanele siyihambe.
dream.p2_post: wangena empilweni yethu — futhi kanye nawo, iqiniso ngabantu ebesibathemba. Ngesikhathi bengena empilweni yethu, sasingasenalutho ngaphandle kwendaba yokwehluleka nezinhliziyo ezisakholwa kokuthile okungcono.
dream.p3_pre: Kodwa-ke bavula umhlaba wabo kithi. Abazange bacele lutho ebuyisela. Babuza umbuzo owodwa nje:
dream.p3_em: "Ningakwazi yini ukwakha uhlobo oluthile lwesikhungo sokufundisa amakhono?"
dream.p4: Lowo mbuzo wasibuyisela ekuphileni. Ngoba lelo kwakuyiphupho ebesinalo ngaphambi kokuduka kwethu — indawo lapho abantu bengafunda khona, bakhule, futhi bathole indlela yabo. Indawo ebuyisela okuthile emphakathini owawusinika manje ithuba lesibili.
dream.p5: Ngesikhathi sifika kule propathi okokuqala, yayigcwele izihlahla ezingafuneki ngokuphelele — amahlathi ayeminyene kangangoba awukwazi ukubona izakhiwo. Ezinye izakhiwo zazibhidlikile, uphahla luwe, izindonga zibhidlika. Izinhlobo zezitshalo ezingafuneki zase zithathe konke, zicindezela ukukhula kwendabuko.
dream.p6: Silwa nalezi zihlahla kuze kube namuhla. Kodwa kancane kancane, ngezinsizakusebenza ezilinganiselwe kanye nomjuluko omningi, siye saqala ukususa, ukuhlanza, nokulungisa. Yonke ingxenye yomhlaba esiyivulayo iwukunqoba okuncane.
dream.p7: Sinamagumbi amabili atholakalayo endlini enkulu ababavolontiya abafuna ukuba yingxenye yalolu hambo — ukususa izitshalo ezingafuneki, ukwakha izakhiwo, ukutshala ingadi yomphakathi, nokunye okuningi.
dream.p8_pre: Uma ufuna ukwenza umsebenzi wangempela obalulekile, ehlathini, eduze kwephaki lezilwane, nomphakathi ozokwamukela —
dream.p9: Ihlathi liyiqiniso, ukwamukela kufudumele, futhi konke okunye kukhula isinyathelo ngesinyathelo, ngothando, izinsizakusebenza ezilinganiselwe, kanye nomphakathi ongazi ukuvumela leli phupho lehluleke.
dream.p10: Silahlekelwe yikho konke esikhathini esithile. Kodwa sathola okuthile okubaluleke kakhulu — ithuba lesibili, umphakathi owakholwa kithi, kanye nenjongo eyayihlala ilinde ukubuya kwethu.
dream.signoff: Siyakwamukela. Sijabule ngokuba khona kwakho lapha.

book.meta_description: Bhukha ikamu le-overland e-Ethlathini Rest Camp, amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Amanani, ukutholakala, kanye nokuqinisekiswa ngokushesha nge-WhatsApp.
book.hero_p: Izindawo ezine ezisusiwe izihlahla ngaphansi kwesivunulo semithombo, ama-fig, ne-tree aloe, amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Izindawo zomlilo. Izinkuni zamahhala. Ukuthula okuphelele kwehlathi.
book.notice: 🏕️ Izindawo ezi-4 ze-overland sezivulwe manje — izindlu zangasese zisezakhiweni, abakampa abazimele ngokuphelele kuphela. Amachalethi, ikhofi shop, nendawo yokudlela kuyeza maduze.
book.rates_intro: Amakamu e-overland azimele ngokuphelele ehlathini lemithombo ne-figs, amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate, iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Ukubhukha ngokuqondile kuphela — akukho zindleko ze-platform, akukho mlamuli.

site_types.name: I-Overland / Ithente Eliphezu Kwemoto
site_types.desc: Indawo esusiwe izihlahla yamathenti aphezu kwezimoto, iitreyila, nezimoto ze-overland. Indawo enesithunzi esusiwe izihlahla.

site_types.name: Indawo Yeqembu
site_types.desc: Yamaqembu ezimoto, amaklabu e-4x4 & uhambo lweqembu. Kuze kube izimoto ezi-3.

important_items: 🛑 Abahambi be-overland abazimele ngokuphelele kuphela — azikho izindlu zangasese okwamanje
🔌 Akukho gesi ezindaweni — ukushaja kuyatholakala endlini enkulu kuphela
🚗 Izindawo ezi-4 ezisusiwe izihlahla — ezengeziwe zizoza njengoba sikhula
🌳 Landa amanzi akho — kunezindawo zamanzi ahlanzekile endaweni, landa okwengeziwe ukuze ube nokuthula kwengqondo

book.form_sub: Siyaqinisekisa ukutholakala futhi sithumele i-invoyisi yediphozithi phakathi namahora ama-4 (07:00–20:00)
book.field_vehicle_placeholder: isb. Toyota Land Cruiser, ithente eliphezu kwemoto + itreyila lokubandisa

book.form_footnote: Siphendula phakathi namahora ama-4 (07:00–20:00). Ngokuthumela, uyavumelana nomthetho wethu wokukhansela.
book.success_p: Sizoxhumana nawe phakathi namahora ama-4 ukuqinisekisa indawo yakho futhi sithumele i-invoyisi yediphozithi.
book.success_message: Isicelo sokubhukha sithunyelwe ngempumelelo! Sizoxhumana nawe phakathi namahora ama-4.
book.error_default: Kukhona okuye kwaba nenkinga. Sicela uzame futhi.

faqs.a: Amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate — ungangena ePhakini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi phakathi kwemizuzu emi-5 ngemuva kokushiya ikamu.
Yebo — izinja eziziphethe kahle ezibotshiwe ngentambo. Qaphela: izilwane azikwazi ukungena ephakini uqobo.
Okwamanje kunamaphoyinti kagesi endlini enkulu okushaja kuphela. Landa okwakho okuncedisa ukuthola ugesi obude.
Yebo ngempela. Ukuhlala okuncane kwezinsuku ezi-2 kungasebenza ngesikhathi seholide zezikole ezimatasa.
Idolobha lase-Hluhluwe linamafutha, i-Shoprite, ikhemisi, i-KFC, i-Debonairs, kanye nezinye izinketho zokuthenga ukudla.
Okwamanje kunezindawo ezine ezisusiwe izihlahla. Ezinye izindawo, amachalethi, kanye nezinye izinsiza kuyathuthukiswa.

findUs.hero_p: Emgwaqweni omkhulu oya e-Memorial Gate, amakhilomitha ama-2 ngaphambi kokungena ePhakini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi.

faq.meta_title: Imibuzo Ejwayelekile — Ukukampa E-Ethlathini Rest Camp
faq.meta_description: Imibuzo ejwayelekile mayelana nokukampa e-Ethlathini Rest Camp e-Hluhluwe, KZN. Izidingo zokuzimela, izinsiza, i-braai, i-Big 5, ukubhukha, nokunye okuningi.
faq.hero_p_pre: Konke okudingeka ukwazi ngaphambi kokuvakasha kwakho. Awuyitholi impendulo yakho?

faqs.q: Ngidinga imoto ezimele ngokuphelele ukuze ngikampe e-Ethlathini?
faqs.a: Yebo — okwamanje. Izindlu zangasese zisezakhiweni okwamanje. Singakwazi ukwamukela kuphela abahambi be-overland nabakampa abazimele ngokuphelele, abanezindlu zangasese zabo namanzi abo. Uma unethente eliphezu kwemoto, i-camper van, noma i-caravan enezinsiza zayo, wamukelekile ngempela. Sakha izindlu zangasese ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka — silandele kumamediya wenkundla ukuze uthole izindaba ezintsha.

faqs.q: Likude kangakanani i-Ethlathini kusuka e-Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Memorial Gate?
faqs.a: Sikude ngamakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka e-Memorial Gate, emgwaqweni omkhulu oya ngqo esangweni. Ungangena ePhakini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi — iphaki lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika — phakathi kwemizuzu emi-5 ngemuva kokushiya ikamu. Iphaki livulwa kusukela ngo-05:00 kuya ku-19:00 (ehlobo) nango-06:00 kuya ku-18:00 (ebusika).

faqs.q: Ingabe i-Ethlathini ifanele izimoto ezinkulu ze-overland namathenti aphezu kwezimoto?
faqs.a: Yebo ngempela. Izindawo zethu zenzelwe khona ababahambi be-overland. Sinezindawo ezisuliwe izihlahla, ezizinzile ezingakwazi ukuthwala izimoto ezinkulu ze-4x4 ezinamathenti aphezu kwazo, izinhlelo zeetreyila, kanye nezinsiza eziphelele ze-overland kufaka phakathi iitreyila ezandiswe kanye ne-awning. Sinayo futhi indawo yeqembu yamaqembu ezimoto namaklabu e-4x4 enendawo ekwazi ukuthwala izimoto ezi-3 nabantu abangu-8.

faqs.q: Yiziphi izinsiza ezitholakalayo e-Ethlathini Rest Camp?
faqs.a: Okwamanje sivuliwe: amakamu ama-4 e-overland asusiwe izihlahla, izindawo zomlilo kuzo zonke izindawo ezinezinkuni zamahhala zasehlathini, izindawo zamanzi ahlanzekile, amaphoyinti kagesi endlini enkulu okushaja izinsiza, i-WiFi ezindaweni ezikhethiwe, kanye ne-braai ehambayo. Kuyeza maduze: izindlu zangasese namashawa, izindawo eziningi, amachalethi, ikhofi shop enenaseri, indawo yokudlela, kanye nesikhungo somphakathi sokufundisa amakhono. Siyethembeka mayelana nalokho osekulungile nalokho okungakalungi.

faqs.q: Ngingenza i-braai / ngithungele umlilo endaweni yami?
faqs.a: Yebo — yonke indawo inendawo yomlilo emisiwe futhi sinikeza izinkuni zamahhala zasehlathini. Sicela ukuthi umlilo ugcinwe ezindaweni ezimisiwe kuphela, futhi amajenareyitha nomsindo omkhulu kuyeke ngo-22:00. Amahora okuthula ngu-22:00–06:00.

faqs.q: Yini ekhona ukuyenza eduze ne-Ethlathini Rest Camp?
faqs.a: Isihloko esiyinhloko iPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi — iphaki lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika (lasungulwa ngo-1895) nendawo ye-Big 5 amakhilomitha ama-2 nje. Iphaki lidume emhlabeni wonke ngenxa yenani labo bhejane abamhlophe kanye nokugcwala kwezilwane. Ngaphandle kwephaki: idolobha lase-Hluhluwe (imizuzu eyi-10) linamafutha, izitolo, izindawo zokudlela, kanye ne-ATM. IPhaki iSimangaliso Wetland (indawo yamagugu omhlaba we-UNESCO) ne-St Lucia bakude ngemizuzu engu-45. Umgudu wokubukela izinyoni wase-Zululand udlula kule ndawo.

faqs.q: Ngibhukha kanjani indawo — kukhona yini uhlelo lokubhukha lwe-inthanethi?
faqs.a: Yebo — sebenzisa ikhasi le-Bhukha & Amanani kule webhusayithi ukuze uthumele isicelo sokubhukha. Siyaqinisekisa ukutholakala futhi sithumela i-invoyisi yediphozithi phakathi namahora ama-4 (07:00–20:00). Ungakwazi futhi ukusithumela i-WhatsApp ngqo ku-{phone} ukuze uthole impendulo esheshayo. Sidinga idiphozithi ye-50% ukuqinisekisa ukubhukha kwakho, ngemali esele ikhokhwa uma ufika.

"Ethlathini" igama lesiZulu elisho "ehlathini". Lichaza kahle ipropathi — ihlathi lemithombo, ama-fig asendle, ne-tree aloe eqaqeni ngasemgwaqweni omkhulu oya ePhakini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Leli gama likhethwe ukuze lihloniphe umhlaba kanye nefa lesiZulu lomphakathi wase-Hluhluwe.

Yebo — izinja eziziphethe kahle ziyamukelwa ezibotshiwe ngentambo. Sicela unake abanye abakampa nezilwane zasendle endaweni. Qaphela ukuthi izilwane azivunyelwe ukungena ePhakini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi uqobo.

Okwamanje kunamaphoyinti kagesi atholakalayo endlini enkulu okushaja amafoni, amakhompuyutha aphathekayo, namabhethri. Awukho ugesi wemeyini ezindaweni ngazinye okwamanje. Sincoma ukuletha isiteshi sikagesi esiphathekayo noma uhlelo lwelanga ukuze uhlale isikhathi eside. Ugesi ezindaweni ngazinye ukuhlelweni kwethu lwentuthuko.

Idolobha lase-Hluhluwe likude ngemizuzu engu-10 futhi linesitolo se-Shoprite, amafutha e-Engen ne-BP, i-ATM, ikhemisi, i-KFC, i-Debonairs, kanye nezinye izindawo zasendaweni zokudlela. Sincoma kakhulu ukugcwalisa amafutha nokuthenga izinto ngaphambi kokufika, ikakhulukazi uma uhlela izinsuku eziningi zokubuka izilwane.

Yebo — samukela ababavolontiya abafuna ukuba yingxenye yokwakha okuthile okubalulekile emphakathini wase-Hluhluwe. Sinamagumbi ababavolontiya atholakalayo endlini enkulu. Imisebenzi isuka ekususeni izitshalo ezingafuneki nokwakha izakhiwo kuya ekulimeni nasekuthuthukisweni kwamakhono omphakathi. Vakashela ikhasi lethu Lokuzinikela ukuze uthole yonke imininingwane.

faq.sidebar_book_p: Bhukha ikamu lakho le-overland ngokuqondile — akukho zindleko ze-platform.
faq.sidebar_wa_p: Sithumele i-WhatsApp — sivamise ukuba ku-inthanethi kusukela ngo-06:30.
faq.sidebar_vol_p: Yiba yingxenye yokwakha okuthile okubalulekile e-Hluhluwe.

volunteer.meta_title: Ukuzinikela — Yiba Yingxenye Yokwakha, Hluhluwe KZN
volunteer.meta_description: Zinikele e-Ethlathini Rest Camp e-Hluhluwe, KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlelo lwababavolontiya lwekamu lezenhlalakahle, i-workaway South Africa, ukuthuthukiswa kwamakhono, ingadi yomphakathi, iphaki lezilwane le-Big 5.
volunteer.eyebrow: Ivolontiya Yezokuvakasha · I-Workaway South Africa · Ikamu Lezenhlalakahle
volunteer.hero_p: Sisize sisuse izihlahla, sakhe, sitshale, futhi sikhulise indawo yezenhlalakahle enhliziyweni ye-KwaZulu-Natal — amakhilomitha ama-2 kusuka ephakini lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika. Alukho ulwazi oludingekayo. Kudingeka ukuzimisela nje.
volunteer.honestBanner: Ngeqiniso mayelana nalokhu: asisilo indawo yababavolontiya ecwengiwe. Siyipropathi eyakhiwa kusuka phansi yithimba elincane elinezinsizakusebenza ezilinganiselwe kanye nombono omkhulu. Uma ufuna ukuvakasha okuphephile ngokuzinikela okuncane — akusikho lokhu. Uma ufuna ukwenza umsebenzi wangempela obalulekile, ehlathini, eduze kwephaki lezilwane, nomphakathi ozokwamukela — woza.

tasks.title: Ukususa Izitshalo Ezingafuneki
tasks.desc: I-chromolaena, i-lantana, kanye ne-prickly pear kususwa ngesigamu ngesigamu ukuze kubuyiselwe ihlathi lendabuko. Kusebenza ngomzimba, kunomvuzo, futhi inqubekelaphambili iyabonakala ngokuqondile.

tasks.title: Ukwakha Izakhiwo
tasks.desc: Izindlu zangasese, ukuthuthukiswa kwezindawo, ucingo, izimpawu, kanye nokugcinwa jikelele kwepropathi. Amathuluzi ayisisekelo ayanikezwa — ulwazi lokwakha luyisibonelelo kodwa aludingekile.

tasks.title: Ingadi Yomphakathi
tasks.desc: Ukutshala, ukunisela, ukususa ukhula, kanye nokugcina ingadi eyondla uhlelo lwentuthuko yomphakathi.

tasks.title: Ukuthuthukiswa Kwepulazi Lezinhlanzi
tasks.desc: Siza ukumisa izakhiwo zokufuya izinhlanzi njengengxenye yohlelo lokufundisa amakhono omphakathi.

tasks.title: Ukwesekela Ukuthuthukiswa Kwamakhono
tasks.desc: Uma unamakhono okwamukela izivakashi, i-IT, ezolimo, ubuciko, noma ukufundisa — kukhona umsebenzi obalulekile lapha wokufundisa isizukulwane esizayo.

tasks.title: Ukubuyiselwa Kwehlathi
tasks.desc: Ukukhulisa izihlahla nezitshalo zendabuko enaseri, ukuphinda utshale izindawo ezisusiwe izihlahla, kanye nokunakekela ihlathi jikelele.

tasks.title: Ukuqashwa Nokubuyiselwa Kwezilwane
tasks.desc: Siza ngokulandelela izilwane, ukuqoqwa kolwazi, kanye nemizamo yokubuyiselwa ngaphakathi nangaphandle kwePhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi. Funda ngokugcinwa kwemvelo ngokwazisa okuqondile.

tasks.title: Izikole Zomphakathi Nemisebenzi Yemfundo
tasks.desc: Sekela izikole zabantwana ezincane zendawo kanye nezikole zomphakathi ngokufundisa, izinhlelo zokufunda, ubuciko nezandla, kanye nemisebenzi yemfundo eyenza umehluko wangempela.

volunteer.benefits_sub: Sinikeza amaphakheji ababavolontiya akhokhwayo afaka indawo yokuhlala, ukudla, ukuthutha, kanye nemisebenzi — ilungiselwe ngokuphelele ngokuya ngezithakazelo zakho nokutholakala kwakho. Lokhu ubudlelwano bangempela — umnikelo wakho uqinisa ngqo i-Ethlathini, uphakamisa umphakathi wakwaBhejane, futhi usekela ukugcinwa kwemvelo kulo lonke isifunda esikhulu se-Big Five Hlabisa, konke lokhu ukugxumeka kwe-KwaZulu-Natal yangempela.

package_includes.label: Ukungena EPhakini IHluhluwe-iMfolozi (2km) Ngezinsuku Zakho Zokuphumula
Ubudlelwano Bangempela Nomphakathi — Hhayi Obhekiswe Kubavakashi
Incwadi Yereferensi Uma Uqedela Ukuhlala Okubalulekile

volunteer.stayCard_p: Sinikeza amaphakheji ababavolontiya alungiselelwe ukuhambisana nezidingo zakho. Ukuhlala, ukudla, ukuthutha, kanye nemisebenzi konke kufakiwe.
volunteer.story_p1_pre: I-Ethlathini yazalwa ethubeni lesibili. Ipropathi yayigcwele izihlahla ezingafuneki, izakhiwo zibhidlika, umhlaba uthathwe izinhlobo zezitshalo ezingafuneki. Umndeni wakwaMdledshe wavula umhlaba ngombuzo owodwa nje:
volunteer.story_p2: Lowo mbuzo usaqhuba yonke into. Amakamu axhasa ukwakha. Ukwakha kudala isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono. Isikhungo sokufundisa amakhono sifundisa umphakathi. Ababavolontiya bayingxenye yaleyo ketango — hhayi izivakashi ezibuka.
volunteer.story_p3: IPhaki iHluhluwe-iMfolozi — iphaki lezilwane elidala kunawo wonke e-Afrika — likude ngamakhilomitha ama-2 emgwaqweni. Imiphakathi yakwaBhejane neyakwaMdledshe isizungezile. Le yindawo yangempela, enezinselelo zangempela, kanye nendawo yabantu bangempela abafuna ukufaka isandla.
volunteer.cta_p: Sithumele i-WhatsApp noma i-imeyili ngesethulo esifushane — ukuthi ungubani, unini otholakalayo, yini ongathanda ukuyifaka, kanye nokuthi iliphi iphakheji othanda ukuba nalo. Akudingeki i-CV. Vele wethembeke.
volunteer.cta_note: Siphendula zonke izicelo phakathi namahora angu-48 · Amaphakheji alungiselelwe ayatholakala · Izindawo zilinganiselwe
